Import CIFs

Drop CIFs here or click below. Filenames are auto-matched to entry IDs and aliases — e.g. MOF-5.cif → MOF-5, HKUST-1.cif → HKUST-1, mil-53-al.cif → MIL-53 (Al-MIL-53 alias). Matched files are cached locally so the 3D viewer auto-loads them next time.

Drop CIFs here · or click to pick files

Cached CIFs

Locally-cached crystal structures, stored in your browser. These take effect when a file with the same name isn't already in cif/<id>.cif. Use Download to save them to disk for permanence or sharing.
